title: Best Friends Club
description:
Modpack to share with friends

Primary experience is based upon mods like Create, Ad Astra, Botania, and the RPG Series with vanilla expansions like YUNGs Better [Everything] and Farmer's Delight.
body:
Fairly sizable (but not kitchen-sink-y) modpack based around some personal preferences and what not. You'll find a large variety of things here including:

More indepth combat experiences!
 - The RPG Series
 - Better Combat Mod
 - Enhanced Weaponry and Jewelry options (not using Tinkers)
 - New and more challenging mobs, mounts, and bosses

Technology and Innovation!
 – Create and Create additions
 - Botania (and some botania integration)
 - Various Power and Storage Solutions (AE2, Powah!, Iron Chests, and more)

Expanded and Enhanced World!
 - YUNG's Better series
 - New structures and dungeon enhancements
 - More and varied loot to find
 - Expanded food and crop selection
 – Worldgen provided by Tectonic

And more!
